subcodes.first_line: O thou lively and fervent spirit! A myriad poets, eloquent orators and masters of rhetoric have emerged amidst this dust-laden throng [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نوش پر جوش و خروش صد کرور شعرا و فصحا و بلغا در این توده غبرا آمدند
subcodes.subjects: @poems and quotation from poetry, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
